creator: wosch@FreeBSD.org
text:
There is a mailing list "vendors"

https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/vendors/

The mailing list "vendors" will not be rotated or archived

http://bit0.nyi.freebsd.org/mailarchive/2023/


However, there is also similar mailing list "freebsd-vendors"

http://bit0.nyi.freebsd.org/mailarchive/2023/freebsd-vendors/

which will be rotated and archived, albeit it is always empty.

It seems that "freebsd-vendors" was active between 2001 and 2011, and then the archive ends.

I'm wondering what is the right mailing list, "vendors" or "freebsd-vendors"?


find -s . -name '*freebsd-vendors*' -type f -size +50c
